amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 — paragraph 1 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 68 — paragraph 1 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. Where the market surveillance authority of a Member State makes one of the following findings, it shall require the relevant provider to put an end to the non-compliance concerned:

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1. Where the national supervisory authority of a Member State makes one of the following findings, it shall require the relevant provider to put an end to the non-compliance concerned:
commission_text: 1. Where the market surveillance authority of a Member State makes one of the following findings, it shall require the relevant provider to put an end to the non-compliance concerned:
parliament_text: 1. Where the national supervisory authority of a Member State makes one of the following findings, it shall require the relevant provider to put an end to the non-compliance concerned:
